boundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
boundary.detailedDescription: An unexpected error occurred in the application. Our team has been notified and is working to resolve the issue.
boundary.supportMessage: If the problem persists, contact support:

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

network.offline: You are offline. Check your connection.
network.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
network.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

generic.contactSupport: If the problem persists, please contact support.
